threats.title: ScarCruft Hacks Gaming Platform to Deploy BirdCall Malware on Android and Windows
threats.summary: The North Korea-aligned state-sponsored hacking group known as ScarCruft has compromised a video game platform in a supply chain espionage attack, trojanizing its components with a backdoor called BirdCallto likely target ethnic Koreans residing in China. threats.title: Weaver E-cology RCE Flaw CVE-2026-22679 Actively Exploited via Debug API
threats.summary: A critical security vulnerability in Weaver (Fanwei) E-cology, an enterprise office automation (OA) and collaboration platform, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability (CVE-2026-22679, CVSS score: 9.8) relates to a case of unauthenticated remote code execution affecting Weaver E-cology 10.0 versions prior to 20260312. threats.title: Microsoft Details Phishing Campaign Targeting 35,000 Users Across 26 Countries
threats.summary: Microsoft has disclosed details of a large-scale credential theft campaign that has leveraged a combination of code of conduct-themed lures and legitimate email services to direct users to attacker-controlled domains and steal authentication tokens.
